title: Long-term Workstreams-native command design
summary: Discussed moving from generic task and decision recording toward native cross-agent coordination commands.

decisions.title: Use semantic event capture rather than browser scraping
decisions.summary: Agents should consume structured Workstreams events instead of inspecting ChatGPT UI state.
decisions.rationale: Structured events are more reliable, auditable, privacy-preserving, and useful to other agents.

next_actions: Codex should inspect existing schema and propose additive migrations.
OpenClaw should later consume recent events using a cursor.
